text:
Email from owner/author:

   Heya John -
   Sorry about the slow response! To answer your questions:
   1) ngrok is only distributed over HTTPS
   2) The software is licensed via ngrok's terms of use:
   https://ngrok.com/download (the current version of ngrok is not open
   source and not distributed Â under an open source license like the older
   version)
   - alan
